notes: v1.14.108 - FIX (bug, John hit live): New UI -> Work -> Deploy -> 'Open Deploy' was dead/off-frame. Root cause: deploy_goToDashboard called showPage('sop') which bounced to the legacy pg-sop page out of the redesign frame. Fix (PART 1, mirrors the v1.14.104 Profile container-resolver): new deploy_opsHost() returns #wk-deploy in redesign, else #ops-content (legacy byte-identical via fallback). deploy_goToDashboard now, in redesign, activates Work->Deploy and renders the Command Center in-frame (no showPage). Routed the CORE deploy loop's container through the resolver - deploy_showCommandCenter (container default + LIST btn), deploy_showList (default + Command-Center btn), deploy_showDetail (fallback list call + c), deploy_showRackDetail (c) - so Command Center <-> List <-> Detail <-> Rack Detail stays in-frame. Shared #ops-content consumers (showOpsTab/manifest/bom/sop/handoff/audit/etc.) untouched. PART 2 (remaining deploy actions: audit log, optic ledger, acceptance, close-out, tombstone, +NEW/mscope) deferred pending on-device verify. Surgical; legacy (?legacy=1) Deploy dashboard unchanged.
